title: selaginella erythropus var. setosa
intro:
Selaginella erythropus var. setosa, also known as Setose Spike Moss, is a type of plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its spiky, hairy stems and dark green, lance-shaped leaves.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders.

The health benefits of Selaginella erythropus var. setosa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage, as well as its ability to boost the immune system.

The herbal preparations of Setose Spike Moss include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
